response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering experience, including distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time systems, with some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience, AI-native product leadership, and proven execution in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments. His fintech-relevant roles (e.g., Direct Mail automation, micro-services at Dunnhumby) are tangential and do not demonstrate the required depth in credit risk, real-time inference, or compliance-heavy systems.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise (event-driven architectures, microservices, real-time data handling)
Experience building and scaling engineering teams (e.g., at Dunnhumby, Optilyz, GISCollective)
Hands-on backend development with multiple languages (D, Node.js, TypeScript, Java) and event streaming
concerns: No demonstrated experience with agentic AI systems in production (current AI work is limited to developer tooling like MCP code generators)
Lacks fintech-specific background (credit risk, liquidity management, regulatory compliance)
Limited evidence of leading cross-functional teams in high-stakes, regulated environments

key_factors.factor: Scaling engineering teams in regulated environments
